case_title: THERESA MOUNPHOXAY VS. NETWORK DELIVERY SYSTEM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT NETWORK DELIVERY SYSTEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUNPHOXAY, THERESA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NETWORK DELIVERY SYSTEM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MOUNPHOXAY, THERESA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED APR-26-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NETWORK DELIVERY SYSTEM
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,850.00 FILED BY MOUNPHOXAY, THERESA AS TO DEFENDANT NETWORK DELIVERY SYSTEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF THERESA MOUNPHOXAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NETWORK DELIVERY SYSTEM IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ERIC OVERSTEG, OWNER. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
